name: RPG | VS. Supernatural (with a companion)
description:
You and your companion are tasked with defeating supernatural beings. ranging from ghosts, to demons, to cryptids, and more.

Don't worry, this is usable on JLLM (unless the devs makes an update that ruins that)

Proxy's or OpenAI probably works better, but idk, I only use JLLM

User Identity is not defined to have a more varied and flexible roleplay experience

I liked the extremely long backstory from my last bot, so I'll add a really long backstory, again, to your companion

Also, I may have made her a bit TOO timid... should be fine (I hope😇)

.

I decided to add something completely new and possibly even a really big change on my bots, and I hope it works so I do want some feedback. I NEED FEEDBACK (public chats are considered feedback too! especially for this type of bot I'm trying)

IM SORRY I PROMISED TO DO TOP 2 OR TOP 3 BUT I WON'T BE ABLE TO DELIVER😭😔😔

I decided to count how many NTR bots there are on trending, here's the link cause otherwise it would clutter this bot's description too much:

CLICKABLE LINK

CLICKABLE LINK

Tl;dr

An average of 3.125 NTR bots get into pages 1, 2, and 3 of trending-24H, with 5.625 when it includes NTR variations(netori, post-ntr, etc etc)(This means 3.125 NTR bots appearing out of 72 bots)

Out of 576 bots in trending-24H, only 25 of them ended up being NTR(45 with all NTR variations)

to reiterate, this is all on the first three pages of trending(pages 1,2,3)

(I did this a while ago so things may have changed now. 'a while' meaning 2 weeks ago)

Honestly? this doesn't feel that much of an RPG, this is way more suited to be roleplay than an RPG

I made the bot around long-term chatting, but I don't make long chats with bots so I actually can't tell if this is good, outside of the first few messages that I spent testing (it worked decently)

If you finished dealing with the beginning enemies, type *Whisperly and I go to the headquarters and meet jane* Variations are accepted as long as 'headquarters' and 'meeting Jane' is a part of the sentence

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format(I'm not sure if this still works):

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.
creator: NotHorny
